title: Keyboard
drDigitalIntro: Next is your keyboard — what you type on. It has somewhere between 80 and 100 buttons, called keys, that let you type numbers, letters, and symbols. Let's try it out: my friend Doggo just sent me a message asking for food, but my hands are tied — can you type my reply for me?

playgroundTask.instructions: Doggo is hungry! Click the box at the bottom, type Dr. Digital's exact reply, then press Enter to send it.
playgroundTask.incomingMessage: I'm hungry. Can you please give me some food Doctor Digital?
playgroundTask.requiredResponse: Sure Doggo, I will give you 32 pebbles and 6 bones. Is that okay?

drDigitalSuccess: Message sent! Doggo is thrilled — and your keyboard skills are already paying off.
drDigitalHint: Click the long box at the bottom that says Type Here, then type my reply exactly as written, including the punctuation: "Sure Doggo, I will give you 32 pebbles and 6 bones. Is that okay?" Press Enter to send it.
